title: Reimagined Vanilla
description: A seamless blend of familiar Minecraft charm and exciting new enhancements. Click and explore now!
body:
# **Reimagined Vanilla**

Welcome to *Reimagined Vanilla*! A meticulously curated modpack for Minecraft 1.20, designed to kindle your spirit of exploration, to immerse you in the thrill of danger, and to fill your world with wonders waiting to be discovered. This project springs from a deep-rooted love for Minecraft and a yearning to rekindle the sense of mystery, exploration, and discovery we all remember from our first days in this vast sandbox. From the wonder of "What's behind that mountain?" to the curiosity of "What lies beneath that ravine?"—we've strived to revive these feelings with this modpack. It blends the familiar Vanilla experience with over 250 mods, enhancing, expanding, and deepening the world without overshadowing Minecraft's unique charm. This is a work of passion, for those who, like us, wish to fall in love with Minecraft all over again.

## **What this pack is about**

* **Exploration – The World Awaits**: Embark on an unforgettable adventure with "Oh The Biomes You'll Go", "Better End", and other breathtaking mods. Venture into unknown lands, teeming with life and secrets. Every journey is a sight to behold, every seed worth cherishing. Awe-inspiring vistas await the brave and curious in this reimagined Minecraft world.
* **Survival – Thin Air**: The air you breathe in the world of Reimagined Vanilla is a friend or a foe. Venture to greater heights, delve into deeper depths, and journey through the very fabric of dimensions. Will you adapt and survive, or succumb to the perilous conditions?
* **Combat – Prepare for Battle**: Combat is no longer a test of speed—it's a dance of strategy. With the strategic depth offered by "Better Combat", each battle is a thrilling interplay of risk and reward.
* **Building – Master Craftsman**: With "Handcrafted" and "Twigs", your creative potential is truly limitless. Construct awe-inspiring structures and intricate decorations, leaving your personal touch on the world of Minecraft.
**Improved Graphics – See Your Game in Another Light**: Revel in the glory of Minecraft under a new light. With the inclusion of "Complementary Shader", "Complementary Reimagined", and "Reimagined Voxels", your adventures will be illuminated by the most dramatic and beautiful scenery ever seen in the game. Powered by the impressive Iris mod, in tandem with a host of performance-enhancing mods, your game's visuals will reach new heights.

Our pack includes these shaders designed to fit different aesthetic preferences and system capabilities:
- **Complementary Shader**: This shader balances beautiful visuals with incredible performance.
- **Complementary Reimagined**: A streamlined variant of the Complementary Shader, it delivers stunning visuals with improved performance.
- **Reimagined Voxels**: This resource-intensive shader brings breathtaking real-time ray tracing to your Minecraft world. It requires a powerful system but offers unmatched visuals.

These shaders are turned off by default to ensure optimal performance on all systems. If your system meets the recommended requirements and you wish to enhance your visual experience, you can easily enable shaders in the video settings. Simply look for the button directing you to the shaders options and choose the one that best suits your system and visual preference.


## **Disclaimer**

This modpack is a labor of love by fans, for fans, and is not affiliated with Mojang Studios. Adventure always brings peril, so tread carefully, and may your courage guide you through the dangers that lie ahead.

## **System Requirements**

Before you embark on your adventure, ensure your system is up to the task:

**Minimum Requirements:**
- CPU: Intel i3 7th Gen or newer / AMD Ryzen 3 3300X or newer
- GPU: Nvidia GTX 1660 Ti or newer / AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT or newer
- RAM: 4GB of RAM allocated to Java

**Recommended Minimum (for 25-30 fps with shaders):**
- CPU: Intel i5 6th Gen or newer / AMD Ryzen 5 3600 or newer
- GPU: Nvidia GTX 1660 Ti or newer / AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT or newer
- RAM: 6GB of RAM allocated to Java

**Recommended:**
- CPU: Intel i5 9th Gen or newer / AMD Ryzen 5 5600X or newer
- GPU: Nvidia RTX 2070 Ti or newer / AMD Radeon RX 6800 or newer
- RAM: 8GB of RAM allocated to Java

## **Recommended Mods**

Although not included in this modpack due to licensing issues, the following mods provide excellent improvements to performance and gameplay. We highly recommend checking them out:

- [Epic Knights: Weapon, Armor and Shields[Fabric/Forge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-weapon-armor-shields): Enhance your combat experience with realistic weapons, armors, and shields. Epic Knights pairs superbly with "Better Combat" and "Combat Roll".

- [Better Fps - Render Distance[Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance-fabric): Improve your game performance by optimizing the rendering distance. The mod switches the default Minecraft rendering from a square radius to a configurable 3D circular radius, reducing the chunks rendered and boosting FPS.

- [Server Performance - Smooth Chunk Save[Forge/Fabric]](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save): Prevent lagspikes and improve server performance by saving chunks continuously over time. Particularly beneficial for servers or single-player worlds running an integrated server.

- [Structure Essentials[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-essentials-forge-fabric): Boost your server performance by speeding up structure locating and reducing lagspikes. Includes additional commands for structure and biome information, and crash prevention measures.

- [fix GPU memory leak[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak): Fix bugs that leak resources within GPU memory. Particularly useful for addressing issues like GL_OUT_OF_MEMORY, GL_FRAMEBUFFER_INCOMPLETE_ATTACHMENT, and GL_INVALID_FRAMEBUFFER_OPERATION.

For more fantastic mods by the author of "Better FPS - Render Distance", "Server Performance - Smooth Chunk Save", "Structure Essentials", and "fix GPU memory leak", check out their page here: [Addon's Projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/someaddon/projects)


# **Adventure Awaits!**

Wait no longer, adventurer!

The world of Reimagined Vanilla beckons. Are you ready to step into the realm of the unknown? Are you prepared to face the challenges and reap the rewards? With every stone unturned, a mystery unsolved. With every battle fought, a lesson learned.

Minecraft is not just a game; it's a journey. With Reimagined Vanilla, it becomes a journey of discovery, courage, and endless fun. We are thrilled to embark on this journey with you, eager to hear your feedback, experiences, and the tales you'll weave.

The adventure begins now. Let the world of Reimagined Vanilla unfold before you...

Welcome to Reimagined Vanilla.
